title: DarkHorseStocks — Campaign Strategy
subtitle: Multi-Channel Outreach & Community Building

paragraphs: Detailed breakdown of multi-channel digital marketing strategy execution at DarkHorseStocks, covering community management, content strategy, data-driven reporting, and infrastructure development for a fintech investment analytics platform.
bullets: Directed multi-channel digital marketing strategy across email, LinkedIn, social media, Telegram, and WhatsApp
Built and maintained content calendar aligned with product launch cycles
Developed automated reporting dashboards tracking engagement, conversion, and subscriber growth KPIs
Managed marketing budget allocation across paid and organic channels
Leveraged WhatsApp API network (35k+) for direct marketing distribution and community engagement
Coordinated cross-functional alignment between content, growth, and product teams

summary: DarkHorseStocks campaign strategy page detailing multi-channel outreach approach across 5 platforms (LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, Twitter), automated reporting dashboards, and content calendar management.
